name: Feature request
about: Propose a change to Odylith's public product contract or behavior
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or operator problem should this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the change you want.

## Why this belongs in Odylith

Explain why this should be part of the public product instead of consumer-local
repo truth or a one-off workflow.

## Alternatives considered

What alternatives did you consider?

## Additional context

Add links, screenshots, examples, or contract notes here.
